title: Evangelion Pilot Film
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Pilot Film?             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Aug 09, 2004 11:04 am Most shows have pilot films, right? So... does any one know if there's a copy of Eva's pilot film floating around the internet?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Aug 09, 2004 11:07 am I've never heard of a pilot, but there is supposed to be Genesis 0:0, which is probably a "making of" type video.

Article: Evangelion Pilot Film
[]: Evangelion Pilot Film?             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Mon Aug 09, 2004 11:04 am Most shows have pilot films, right? So... does any one know if there's a copy of Eva's pilot film floating around the internet?

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Aug 09, 2004 11:07 am I've never heard of a pilot, but there is supposed to be Genesis 0:0, which is probably a "making of" type video.
